content.query:
SELECT      FS.CUNO AS          CustomerNumber
,           OC.CUNM AS          CustomerName
,           CINO AS             InvoiceNumber
,           IVDT AS             InvoiceDate
,           ACDT AS             PaidDate
,           OD.CUOR AS          CustomerPoNumber
,           OD.ITNO AS          ItemNumber
,           MM.ITDS AS          ItemDescription
,           CS.TX40 AS          Brand
,           OD.IVQT AS          InvoicedQuantity
--,           CUAM*-1 AS          PaidAmount
FROM        M3.FSLEDG FS
JOIN        M3.OCUSMA OC ON FS.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.ODLINE OD ON FS.CINO = OD.EXIN
JOIN        M3.MITMAS MM ON OD.ITNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB AS CS ON MM.ITCL = CS.STKY AND CS.STCO = 'ITCL'
WHERE       FS.CUNO IN
(
'50009', '50322', '50002', '50438', '50290', '50016',
'50481', '50742', '50218', '50018', '50025', '50582',
'50761'
)
AND         FS.TRCD = '20'
AND         ACDT BETWEEN '2023-08-01' AND '2023-11-30'

UNION ALL

SELECT			DISTINCT 
				RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID AS			CustomerNumber
,				C.NAME AS						CustomerName
,				RR.INVOICE_ID AS				InvoiceNumber
,				RR.INVOICE_DATE AS				InvoiceDate
,				RR.LAST_PAID_DATE AS			PaidDate
,				RRL.CUSTOMER_PO_REF AS			CustomerPoNumber
,				RRL.PART_ID AS					ItemNumber
,				P.DESCRIPTION AS				ItemDescription
,				P.USER_1 AS						Brand
,				RRL.QTY	AS						InvoicedQuantity
--,				CASE WHEN RR.INVOICE_TYPE = 'MEMO' THEN RR.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT*-1
--				ELSE RR.TOTAL_PAID_AMOUNT
--				END AS							PaidAmount
FROM			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE RR
JOIN			ECV.RECEIVABLES_RECEIVABLE_LINE RRL ON RR.INVOICE_ID = RRL.INVOICE_ID
LEFT JOIN		ECM.PART P ON RRL.PART_ID = P.ID
JOIN			ECM.CUSTOMER C ON RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID = C.ID
WHERE			RR.BILL_TO_CUST_ID IN
(
'HD1000', 'HOM003', 'LO4000', 'LO4001', 'LO4003',
'NO4564', 'NO4565', 'TA8583', 'CS8100', 'CS8101',
'HD1000'
)
AND				LAST_PAID_DATE BETWEEN '2023-08-01' AND '2023-11-30'
